title: BedrockUltimateTool
description: Tools for chiseling and collecting bedrock to create bedrock like structures
body:
Bedrock Ultimate Tool Mod (Simplified Version)

Mod Core Summary

Bedrock Ultimate Tool is a mod compatible with Minecraft 1.20.1 (Forge 47.x.x series). Its core function is to allow players to crack and collect bedrock, which was originally indestructible in the game. The mod includes exclusive bedrock tools (with infinite durability, fire and lava resistance, and enchantability), bedrock-related items, and a supporting achievement system. It is exquisitely designed and fully localized in English, breaking the game's limits while maintaining a certain level of challenge.

Simple Mod Introduction

Still regret not being able to mine bedrock in Minecraft? Come try the "Bedrock Ultimate Tool" mod!

This mod is specially created for version 1.20.1, helping you break the ultimate limit of the game — easily crack and collect bedrock! It comes with a full set of tools such as the Bedrock Chisel and Bedrock Pickaxe, all with infinite durability and lava resistance. Just right-click on bedrock with the Bedrock Chisel to make it crack, then mine the cracked bedrock with the Bedrock Pickaxe to get bedrock shards, which can be used to craft more powerful bedrock tools.

In addition, there are exclusive achievements to unlock, all content is fully localized in English, and it is simple and easy to use. As long as you install the corresponding version of Forge, you can start your bedrock adventure, break the limits and create freely!
~~~~
